title: Nugget
description: adds the famous nugget to mincraft!
body:
![Splash Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea7513d780fd9201e88c43381f9fcd82dc6b55a3.png)

### About  
This is a Minecraft 1.21 mod that brings the meme of **Gegagedigedagedago Nugget** into the Minecraft, Whether you’re building, mining, this mod introduces nugget into minecraft.

---
### Video Preview

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Rql5ZtfpFLE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

### Features  
Here’s what’s currently in the mod, with more to come in future updates:  

- **Nugget Block**: nugget building blocks.  
- **Nugget Ores**: Naturally generating nugget ores that allow you to mine and collect nuggets in your world.  
- **Raw Nugget and Nugget**: nuggets serve as the foundation for many recipes and tools.  
- **Swords & Tools***: Equip yourself with nugget weapons and tools.  
- **Nugget Armor***: Protect yourself with nugget armor.  

---

### Soon-to-be Features  
Here’s what we’re planning to add next! Feel free to suggest more ideas:  
 
- **Nugget Furnaces**: A special furnace that boosts smelting efficiency when using nuggets as fuel.  
- **Nugget Cake**: A cake made from nuggets to restore your hunger bar.  
  
---

### Installation  
Follow these simple steps to get started:  

1. **Download the Mod**: Head over to the mod’s download page (or click the green “Download” button) to grab the latest version.  
2. **Install Forge**: Make sure you have the latest version of Forge installed for Minecraft 1.21.  
3. **Save to Mods Folder**: Place the downloaded mod file in the `mods` folder within your Minecraft directory.  
   - On Windows: Press `Win + R`, type `%appdata%\.minecraft\mods`, and hit Enter.  
   - On Mac: Navigate to `~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/mods`.  
4. **Launch Minecraft**: Open Minecraft with the Forge profile, and the mod will load automatically.
